Ascent List for Alex Doe - 2025

A Log of Peaks, Hikes, Climbs, and Attempts

List is for the year 2025 only - Click "All" below to see all ascents.

This page shows all of Alex Doe's mountain trips that have been entered on this site. Its focus is on the individual climbs, not the peaks themselves, and provides information about the ascent route, elevation gain, distance, route conditions, and gear used for each trip. Use the  Ascent Subset Page to filter these ascents using various criteria.

Note: Click on an individual linked "Date" value for a full trip report. Ascents marked with a "TR" have a written trip report with the indicated number of words.

Icon Legend for Route and Gear/Help Icons

Ascent Data Export

Click this button to download a CSV file of all your ascent data for use in Excel, Word, or other programs. The CSV file always contains your ascent data for all years. The file may be very large and may take some time to generate if you have entered hundreds of ascents.

Trip reports will have HTML embedded, and long reports (over 32,000 characters) are truncated due to file format limitations. To get a complete copy of long trip reports, copy and paste from the ascent view page.

Exports for Import to other sites:
Hill-bagging.co.uk

Privacy note: You can only export your own ascent list and not anyone else's.
